'''Darrick Bachman''' worked as the production coordinator, writer, and outline editor for [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Volume One]]<ref name="CW1" /> and production manager, writer and outline editor for [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume Two|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Volume Two]].<ref name="CW2" />

{{Bio-stub}}
